introduction: Welcome everyone, we're going to explore some performance metrics from the last fiscal year. Specifically, we'll focus on the average duration of telehealth sessions across our platforms.

subsections.heading: Overview of Telehealth Usage in FY2025
subsections.content:
• MediConn's telehealth users increased by 10% in FY2025
• The most significant growth was observed in the geriatric patient demographic
• The platform was used for over 100,000 consultations in FY2025
• The customer retention rate was 75% in FY2025
• The platform was accessed from over 20 different countries
• 30% of sessions were conducted outside traditional working hours
subsections.justification: This slide provides general usage stats, but does not give any information about the average session duration. Strategy: general industry trends and operational details.

subsections.heading: Average Duration of Telehealth Sessions
subsections.content:
• Session duration varies widely based on the nature of the consultation
• Emergency consultations generally have longer durations than routine check-ups
• Technical issues can impact the duration of a session
• Duration may be influenced by the patient's comfort with technology
• Sessions conducted after working hours typically have longer durations
• Training and user familiarization can help reduce session duration
subsections.justification: This slide discusses factors that can influence session duration, but does not provide any information about the actual average duration. Strategy: related factors and potential influences.

subsections.heading: Impact of Session Duration on User Satisfaction
subsections.content:
• User satisfaction may decrease if sessions are too long due to fatigue
• Short, concise sessions are preferred for routine check-ups
• User satisfaction can be influenced by the doctor's ability to effectively communicate within the given session duration
• Satisfaction ratings generally increase when sessions end with clear next steps
• Dissatisfaction may arise from perceived wasted time in longer sessions
subsections.justification: This slide discusses the impact of session duration on user satisfaction but does not provide any data on the average duration of sessions. Strategy: related impacts and potential outcomes.

conclusion: In conclusion, understanding the average duration of our telehealth sessions can inform our strategies to improve user experience. We should continue to monitor these metrics and aim to enhance our services based on user feedback.
